main_modules.responsibility: Expose auth, users, products, orders, dashboard and chat HTTP endpoints.
Coordinate auth, chat orchestration, products, orders and dashboard use cases.
Query and persist users, products, orders, order items and dashboard aggregates.
Define SQLAlchemy tables and relationships for users, products, orders and order_items.
Validate requests, filters, chat state, cart items, DTOs and dashboard responses.
Convert ORM order graphs into response DTOs.
Hash passwords, issue JWTs and validate REST/WebSocket tokens.
Dispatch chat intents across idle, building_order, review_order and checkout states.
Publish order events to Redis and broadcast them to WebSocket clients.
Build prompt from current state and products, call Gemini, validate JSON intent output.

database: startup checks validate PostgreSQL and Redis
deployment: Dockerfile.dev and docker-compose.dev.yml for local API plus Redis
